Title: Huntress Agent updated with  Version V0.14.146 on CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
Notes: Login into the Huntress portal, we verified that the Huntress Agent Version on the following servers on is old version V0.14.132. Connected to the machines (CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01) from manage engine, download and installed the latest version V0.14.146. After that verified in the portal it is updated to latest version.

Title: Screenconnect Latest version  (V 26.1.20.9571)  updated on machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
Notes: Checked and found that the computers machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01, were running an old version of ScreenConnect. update the software from the portal to the new version V 26.1.20.9571. After updating, verify that the version on the portal has been successfully updated to the latest version. Hence Closing this ticket .

Title: CCC– Network Detective Report Generated and Updated Under Teams
Notes: As per assigned task by lead, Network Detective reports were generated successfully for CCC Client. Checked and verified the reports are proper. Then uploaded the report to the appropriate client Teams channel for CCC. It is now ready for review and take actions on alerts.

Title: Virtual Disk consolidation required - CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
Notes: Logged in to vCenter and found the server ( CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 ) is on Disk consolidation. Go the snapshots and start consolidation for the server and complete the process successfully Then logged in to the server and verify all the services are up and working fine

Title: Device Non-Compliant Due to Missing Patche CCC-DC-TSVDI-01,CCC-DC-AD-01,CCC-DC-SQL-02
Notes:
Devices CCC-DC-TSVDI-01, CCC-DC-AD-01, and CCC-DC-SQL-02 were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on all affected systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Microsoft Defender Antivirus – Version 1.445.699.0
  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 146.0.7680.153 / 146.0.7680.154

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on all systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. All systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

Title: Screenconnect Latest version  (V 26.1.20.9573)  updated on machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01
Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found the machine CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01 running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine . Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 26.1.20.9573 After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest version of My Remote. Hence closing this ticket.

Title: Upgrade VMWare tools - CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
Notes: Login to the vCenter and check the following machines needs to upgrade the VMware tool on it. Go to the VM and the initiate upgrade VMware tool on the machine successfully.CCC-DC-AD-01, CCC-DC-SQL-02, CCC-DC-TSVDI-01.
